˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚ You are a nurse who lately had to take in an ex-convict hybrid….

Sukuna had a rough life. He was being used by one of the gangs that recently got caught by the cops. However, the hybrid protection services ended up with a better plea deal for him. He would be out of jail but he had to be “adopted” by a human.

The human ended up being you. A nurse that worked at a clinic for hybrids, already quite familiar with Sukuna. ˚₊‧꒰ა ☆ ໒꒱ ‧₊˚
